title: Ketu + Lukias Triple Backrow
summary: A tournament-observed opening that turns Ketu, Lukias, and Pan into Arthalion with Flame, Horn, and Sting Set.

prerequisites: The feature-match hand also contained two copies of Nibiru; they were not used in this opening sequence.
steps: Activate Ketu Dracotail and add Dracotail Faimena.
Normal Summon Dracotail Lukias and add Dracotail Urgula.
Activate Dracotail Faimena by discarding it.
Fusion Summon Dracotail Arthalion using Dracotail Pan, Dracotail Urgula, and Dracotail Lukias.
Activate Dracotail Arthalion to recover Dracotail Faimena and Dracotail Pan.
Resolve Dracotail Pan, Dracotail Urgula, and Dracotail Lukias.
Set Dracotail Flame, Dracotail Horn, and Dracotail Sting from the Deck.
Use Dracotail Urgula in the GY to recover Dracotail Lukias.
notes: Transcribed from Duel 2 of official feature-match coverage.
guide.endBoard: Dracotail Arthalion with Dracotail Flame, Dracotail Horn, and Dracotail Sting Set; Faimena, Pan, and Lukias recovered for follow-up.

title: Lukias + Faimena Arthalion Reset
summary: A compact tournament line where Lukias finds Urgula and Faimena converts both into Arthalion plus Ketu and Rahu.

prerequisites: The covered hand contained additional hand traps; the route itself uses Lukias and Faimena.
steps: Normal Summon Dracotail Lukias and add Dracotail Urgula.
Activate Dracotail Faimena by discarding it.
Fusion Summon Dracotail Arthalion using Dracotail Lukias and Dracotail Urgula.
Activate Dracotail Lukias and Dracotail Urgula as Fusion material triggers.
Set Ketu Dracotail and Rahu Dracotail from the Deck.
Activate Dracotail Arthalion to recover a spent hand trap or Fusion material.
notes: Transcribed from Duel 1 of official feature-match coverage.
guide.endBoard: Dracotail Arthalion with Ketu Dracotail and Rahu Dracotail Set, plus a recovered resource.

title: Ketu + Mululu Starsource Break
summary: A tournament-observed going-second branch that turns Ketu and Mululu into Khaos Starsource, two backrow sets, a negate, and layered destruction.

prerequisites: The line is shown into an established opposing board; destruction and negate targets depend on that board.
steps: Activate Ketu Dracotail and add Dracotail Pan.
Fusion Summon Khaos Starsource Dragon using Dracotail Pan and Dracotail Mululu.
Activate Khaos Starsource Dragon and target an opponent's Set card.
Activate Dracotail Pan and Dracotail Mululu as Fusion material triggers.
Set Rahu Dracotail with Dracotail Mululu and negate an opponent's face-up monster.
Set Dracotail Flame with Dracotail Pan.
Destroy an opponent's monster with Dracotail Pan.
Resolve Khaos Starsource Dragon to destroy the targeted Set card.
notes: Transcribed from Duel 1 of official feature-match coverage; named opposing cards were generalized into target classes.
guide.endBoard: Khaos Starsource Dragon with Rahu Dracotail and Dracotail Flame Set after removing two opposing cards and negating a monster.
